name: Candle of Invocation
overview: A magical candle with multiple powerful effects when lit.

properties.activation: The candle's magic is activated when lit, which requires a Magic action
properties.burn_time: After burning for 4 hours, the candle is destroyed. You can snuff it out early for use at a later time, deducting burn time in 1-minute increments
properties.light: While lit, the candle sheds Dim Light in a 30-foot radius

effects.advantage: While you are within the light, you have Advantage on D20 Tests
effects.spellcasting_bonus: A Cleric or Druid in the light can cast level 1 spells they have prepared without expending spell slots

gate_spell.description: Alternatively, when you light the candle for the first time, you can cast Gate with it
gate_spell.portal: The portal created by the spell links to a particular Outer Plane chosen by the DM or determined randomly
